hypothesis: Augmenting PCDiff with a percolation-aware regularizer that penalizes compositions with combined CNT+Graphene volume fraction below pc=0.08 when conditioning on high thermal conductivity will, for 10,000 conditional samples per target, at least double the proportion of fabrication-valid composites meeting Thermal Conductivity ≥ 1.2 W/mK and Yield Strength ≥ 3500 MPa
